strategy: Settle in for a long fight. Malificus has 40,000 Health, 104% boost, and no boost school for you, so this is a team grind: one hitter, supports blade and Feint, healer sustains.
Use his free cards. Every fourth round he hands all wizards a random card, and one of them is Woolly Mammoth (1,750), a strong free hit you should save and fire on your setup.
Do not waste the good rolls. When you get Woolly Mammoth or Sprite (30+15,000) from his handout, hold them for a big turn rather than dumping them.
He is Death with 55% Life resist and only 15% Myth resist (his lightest), so a Myth hitter or Myth prisms cut deepest; avoid attacking into his heavier resists.
Clear Fleshless Chattel with AoE so the minion does not chip your team while you build the long stack on your hitter.
Feint and blade the hitter over several rounds, then unload one large Myth AoE, supplementing with his own gifted Woolly Mammoth cards to speed the 40k down.
cheatNotes: At the start of every fourth round he gives all wizards one random card from his list; some are strong free hits worth banking.
He remarks on it when a wizard casts the Woolly Mammoth (1,750) card he handed out, which is a solid free attack to save for your setup.
